description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sideboard or credenza constructed primarily from wood with a natural, medium-brown grain pattern. The front features a combination of open shelving, two cabinet doors, and a set of drawers, each with small, square black handles. The unit is elevated on slender, dark metal legs, giving it a light, airy appearance and making it easy to clean underneath. The top, sides, and back are finished in the same wood grain, providing a cohesive and stylish look. The open shelves on the left side are ideal for displaying items or storing electronics, while the closed compartments offer concealed storage. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban interiors such as lobbies, offices, or apartment living rooms.
description: A modern wooden sideboard with open shelves, cabinet doors, and drawers, elevated on slim metal legs. Features a natural wood grain finish and black square handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing open shelves, two cabinet doors, and a set of drawers with black handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood grain pattern and slim metal leg, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, continuous wood grain panel with no openings or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the wood grain and metal leg.
